name: WordPress
install: Paste the snippet in your theme's header.php before wp_head(), or use a header-scripts plugin. A native plugin is on the roadmap.

name: Shopify
install: Add the snippet to theme.liquid just inside <head>, above the Google/GA4 tags. Works with Shopify's Customer Privacy API.

name: Webflow
install: Project Settings → Custom Code → Head Code. Paste the snippet first, above any GTM/Analytics embed.

name: Wix
install: Settings → Custom Code → add to <head> on all pages, set to load first. (Note: Wix bundles a free banner — Tagshield is for multi-site/agency and ad-signal correctness.)

name: Squarespace
install: Settings → Advanced → Code Injection → Header. Paste the snippet above other tracking code.

name: Framer
install: Site Settings → Custom Code → Start of <head>. Paste the snippet before analytics.

name: Next.js
install: Add the inline snippet to a <Script strategy="beforeInteractive"> in your root layout, ahead of the GA/GTM <Script> tags.

name: Google Tag Manager
install: Add Tagshield via the GTM Community Template (2 clicks), or as a Custom HTML tag firing on Consent Initialization — All Pages.
